meaning: n.规则,惯例,统治,章程,破折号,准则,标准,控制vt.规定,统治,支配,裁决vi.统治,管辖,裁定n.规则,水线
examples: That's a good rule to go by.
He continued to rule the country de facto.
The new rule will be applied retrospectively.
They welcome the prospect of prosperity and the rule of law, whoever helps to bring it.
Such a rule is not likely to improve private investment decision-making or promote more efficient markets.
